title: Command Cockpit Runway Level Strip
summary: Compressed the Milestone Runway into a compact level-route strip inside the Command Cockpit so the RUN module reads like a progression board instead of a tall lane report.
proof: Scoped the Runway compression to the Command Cockpit so the full Milestone Runway remains available elsewhere.
Reduced Runway padding, header copy, stat cells, lens chips, route node dimensions, and PATH/LOG/TRL actions.
Kept the existing All/Gates/Unlocks/Events/Future lenses and node data model intact so cloned repos inherit the compact level strip automatically.
Updated README, index marker, snapshot generation, regression floors, and trace metadata so the standalone atlas records the Runway Level Strip unlock.
